name: MagiCon
description:
MagiCon is a multi-fandom convention based in the Oslo area, launched in 2022 and created for nerds, by nerds. The event covers cosplay, drag, board games, roleplay, J-pop, video games and other corners of pop culture.

The 2026 edition, MagiCon Vanguard, takes place at Oslo Konserthus and features international guests from animation, gaming and voice acting.
notes: magicon.no blocks WebFetch (403); homepage was fetched via curl with a browser UA + Referer to retrieve images. Banner is the 2026 'Vanguard' hero with the date overlay — works as a banner but is taller than 4:1. Description paraphrased from previously verified about-us copy plus the Roster Con 2026 listing.
